metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_4752
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 6C: in NCAM-/-, which disrupts AP2-based SV endocytosis, pulldowns of synaptophysin from crude SV fractions yielded a strong increase in AP-3. This suggests an increase of endocytosis via AP3 pathways.

Figure 7. AP3-mediated bulk membrane retrieval was enhanced in NCAM-/- synaptic boutons.

Figure 8. AP3-dependent synaptic vesicle endocytosis and intrasynaptic processing are upregulated in NCAM-/- synaptic boutons.

The antibody for AP3 targeted AP3B2.. Experimental description: M&M: "To prepare cultures of hippocampal neurons, 1- to 3-d-old C57BL/6J and NCAM-/- mice of either sex from homozygous breeding pairs were used."

antibody:
"neuronal adaptin-like protein beta (βNAP) subunit of AP-3 (clone 18, catalog #610892)"
note; this is AP3B2

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
